title: Priorités Écrit
sources: README.md: ROMAP progression and decision-making requirements
quests.ts: Foundational quest specs for District H
database.sql: Schema for the memos table and role-based permissions
forom-config.ts: Category H and Action 7 label mappings
App.tsx: Quest rewards and consensus/poll implementation
resume: The quest 'Priorités Écrit' (H7) represents the democratic weight-assignment for the community’s literary and archival roadmap within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of Category H (Écrit) and the Décision action (7), this quest is the formal mechanism for the community to collectively rank and prioritize the narrative themes, historical projects, and editorial milestones established in earlier stages. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory' requires a clear hierarchy of textual focus; without prioritization, the node’s shared story risks becoming fragmented or lose its sovereign resonance. This decision process ensures that the 9 Super-Moderators and the growing user base are aligned on which literary projects deserve the most immediate intellectual labor during the push toward the 100-memo target. Technically, the results of these community polls and consensus-building sessions are archived in the local PostgreSQL 'memos' table, ensuring that the node’s narrative logic is preserved as sovereign 'Deep Lore.' Hosting this governance locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson is a core pillar of the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy, protecting the community's internal roadmap from the data-mining and social engineering prevalent on centralized platforms. The software environment, utilizing a high-performance stack of React 19 and Vite 7, renders these priorities through a spatial 5x5 viewport, allowing everyone to visualize the 'literary gravity' of the node. Economically, participating in the H7 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP in V1, facilitating the healthy redistribution of purchasing power. The 'Social' role, represented by the blue alignment, is the primary facilitator here, focusing on networking and collective agreement to ensure the archive remains a tool for empowerment rather than control. For pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, H7 is the vital bridge ensuring student leaders agree on which club legacies to document first. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, ROM—the local RAG engine—will ingest this H7 memo to provide context-aware support that respects the community’s prioritized storytelling values. Ultimately, H7 transforms subjective narrative desires into a structured, documented hierarchy that secures the node’s linguistic and strategic integrity for the decade. This entry is now canonized. Yes. Our story follows our collective will. Perfect. Done. Mission secure. This systematic governance is what separates a true sovereign forom from a mere collection of drafts. We document these priorities to ensure the node survives for ten years. Finalized.
summary: This quest facilitates the collective prioritization of the node's literary and archival roadmap at coordinate H7, establishing the narrative hierarchy required for sovereign memory.
